title: CARB Announces Latest LCFS Updates Will be Implemented Next Month
content:
CARB announced that the implementation of Californiaâ€™s amended LCFS will begin on July 1, 2025, following approval by the Office of Administrative Law. The amended regulation focuses public and private sector investment towards increasing cleaner fuel and transportation options for Californians, accelerating the deployment of zero-emission infrastructure, and helping the state achieve legally mandated air quality and climate targets.

â€œImplementing the July 1 effective date for the LCFS provides critical certainty to industry, as well as the LCFS credit market,â€ said CARB Board Chair Liane Randolph. â€œBut often lost in the noise around this program are our primary reasons for approving it: better health for Californians, our economy and the environment, as well as achieving required state and federal air quality standards.
author: Analysts Account
